de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class DefaultTaskStartedInfo

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.DefaultTaskStartedInfo
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    TaskStartedInfo

    public class DefaultTaskStartedInfo
extends Object
implements TaskStartedInfo
    Default implementation of a TaskStartedInfo.

      • getKind

        public TaskStartedInfo.TaskKind getKind()
        allows to query about the nature of task
        Specified by:
        getKind in interface TaskStartedInfo
        Returns:
        the kind of the task

      • getMessage

        public String getMessage()
        returns a message with a description of the task, example: "Processing Strategy"
        Specified by:
        getMessage in interface TaskStartedInfo

      • getSize

        public int getSize()
        returns measure for the total size of the task. The number indicates the amount of work needed to complete the task, mostly used by the GUI to display a progress bar. A returned value of 0 means unknown size.
        Specified by:
        getSize in interface TaskStartedInfo
